description: Customised in comfort for those who love to trek, these fishermen sandals from rockport are ruggedly crafted from toe to heel and are stylish to the T. With a wuick lacing system and a grippy rubber sole, it is designed to keep you a step ahead of others. Pair these with casual wear for that ultimate feel of comfort and style.Upper Leather upper for rugged feel and style Meshed upper for enhanced breathability of feet Quick lacing system for a snug and customised Fit Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place Midsole Moulded and well cushioned EVA midole for long term durability and protection of feet against impact Moisture absorbant PU footbed for added dry comfort and breathability of the feet Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Outsole Rubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves and traction rich rubber sole for anti-slip comfort AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impact Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
